subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My Glory! The grace of God, exalted be His majesty, hath vouchsafed confirmation and granted success through earthly means [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی فضل حق جل جلاله تایید عطا نمود و توفیق بخشید و باسباب ارض
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @purpose; goal of creation, @high station of the true believer, @consolation and comfort
